title: sambucus chinensis var. formosana
intro: Sambucus chinensis var. formosana, also known as the Taiwanese elderberry or Formosan elderberry, is a plant species in the family Adoxaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Sambucus chinensis var. formosana include its ability to help alleviate cold and flu symptoms, reduce fever, and support the immune system. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to promote overall health and well-being.
